description_long: This lounge object is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern design, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sectional features multiple seat and back cushions, all of which are attached and uniformly sized, providing ample seating space. The backrest is segmented and slightly angled for ergonomic support, with a consistent height across the entire length. The armrests are present at both ends, low-profile, and seamlessly integrated into the sofa's frame. The legs are short, sturdy, and barely visible, likely made of metal or wood, supporting the sofa close to the ground. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and minimal visible stitching, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance.
description: A large, L-shaped beige sectional sofa with attached cushions, low-profile armrests, and a smooth, solid upholstery finish. The design is modern and spacious, suitable for urban lounge settings.
description_view_0: From this view, the L-shape and the attached back and seat cushions are clearly visible, along with the low-profile armrests at both ends.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the sectional's corner configuration and the uniform height of the backrest, as well as the seamless integration of the armrests.
description_view_2: The sofa's length and the arrangement of the cushions are prominent, with the backrest's segmentation and the short legs partially visible.
description_view_3: The chaise section and the overall depth of the lounge are most apparent, with the armrest and cushion arrangement clearly shown.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple attached seat and back cushions arranged in an L-shape, with uniform size and a corner section; all cushions are fixed in place.
attribute_backrest_design: Segmented, straight backrest of medium height, slightly angled for comfort, with no tufting or headrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present at both ends, low-profile, straight, and integrated into the sofa frame.
attribute_leg_style: Short, sturdy legs, minimally visible, likely straight and made of wood or metal, supporting the sofa close to the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid beige color with a smooth, matte texture and minimal visible stitching.
